description: A vertical full-color candid photograph taken indoors in an office hallway (yellow walls, carpeted floor, fluorescent lighting, a recessed wall cabinet at left). It shows the same arrest as the companion image, from behind: a handcuffed man in the center wearing a dark graffiti/flame-print short-sleeve shirt (text fragments like 'DRIP' visible) and blue jeans with bright green-and-black sneakers, hands cuffed behind his back, being walked down the corridor. He is escorted by two officers—at left a plainclothes officer in a dark cap, black t-shirt and tan trousers, and at right a uniformed law-enforcement officer (Florida Highway Patrol trooper) in a tan/khaki shirt and trousers with a duty belt, radio and holstered equipment, holding the detainee's arm. There is no on-image graphic text, headline, slogan, seal or logo overlay; this is a documentary arrest/perp-walk photograph, not a designed meme. Context from the tweet: USCIS describes an illegal alien from Cuba taken into custody at the Orlando office in coordination with ICE and Florida Highway Patrol. Marked is_designed=false.
notable_text: (no on-image text; detainee's shirt shows fragmentary print text such as 'DRIP')
